# Diffraction

**Summary**: The bending of waves around obstacles or through openings.

---

## How It Appears in the Thesis Collection

- [[2009-al-lehyani|Al-Lehyani, 2009]] analyzed the impact of diffractions on seismic shot gathers.

## Scientific Context

- [[2009-al-lehyani|Al-Lehyani, 2009]] Diffractions are a primary source of noise in near-surface regions.

## Measurement and Characterization Methods



## Key Findings Across Sources

- Diffractions manifest as strong hyperbolic events that mask weak reflected body waves. ([[2009-al-lehyani|Al-Lehyani, 2009, p. 10]])
